name: Blinks

releases.author: diagonalcounty
releases.description:
## Blinks 0.2.0

Better block links for Obsidian. Phrase search. Readable `^slugs`. Slightly judgmental toward `#^fa5d4c`.

### Install
Community Plugins (once published), or copy release assets into `.obsidian/plugins/blinks/`.

### Highlights
- `^^` inside a wikilink (works even after `]]` auto-close)
- Phrase-ranked in-note block picker
- Readable `#^slug` ids (core-compatible)
- Prompt-on-edit slug realign
- Aliases: `[[note#^slug|display]]`

Author: **diagonalcounty**
